title: I built an AI backtester that simulates Prop Firm Eval pass odds and automates the same rules on TopstepX (via ProjectX)
author: wealthlearn
selftext:
We’ve spent the last **6 months** building something special for retail traders who want to automate and backtest without coding.  
  
The goal is simple: take a trading strategy idea and get it all the way to a real backtest and automation without needing to code it yourself.  Not some restrictive "Go long when RSI hits 35" nonsense, but ***full customization for discretionary concepts.***

You can either **describe** the strategy in plain English or upload a **research paper.** [QuantCodeGPT ](https://www.wealthlearn.ca/quantcodegpt)turns it into strategy code.

[WealthLearn.ca](http://WealthLearn.ca) runs the backtest and shows the actual results: win rate, drawdown, profit factor, trade count, average win/loss, regime performance, session performance, and where the strategy works or breaks.

It also runs prop firm style simulations, including Monte Carlo pass odds, so you can see how the same strategy might perform under evaluation rules instead of just looking at a normal backtest.

Then, once the backtest is done, you can click **Export to DelDirect**.

That gives you a file.  Upload that file into DelDirect (our local automation software). **Done**.  


DelDirect can run the same backtested rules live on a TopstepX account through the ProjectX API in under a minute.

Not claiming this makes any strategy profitable, simply lets you automate your strategy.

Instead of spending days or weeks turning an idea into code, testing it, checking the risk, and setting up automation, we’re trying to make that whole process much faster and more realistic.

Strategy idea → AI code → backtest → prop firm pass odds → TopstepX automation.

That’s the workflow we’re building.
